regions.label: SPC chart axes, legend, thresholds, and trend

sectionPath: PVD thickness SPC and alarm interlocks

regions.goldSection: PVD thickness SPC and alarm interlocks

leaves.expectation: The chart uses run sequence on the horizontal x-axis and TiN thickness in nm on the vertical y-axis.
The blue solid line is the PVD-03 measured TiN-thickness series.
The amber/orange dashed line is the 45.0 nm warning threshold.
The red dashed line is the 47.0 nm UCL.
Blue points mean Inside or Recovered below the 45.0 nm warning threshold.
Amber/orange points mean Warning at or above 45.0 nm but below 47.0 nm.
A red point means Above UCL at more than 47.0 nm.
The series rises from R-2241 through a 47.4 nm peak at R-2245, then falls through R-2246 to a recovered 44.1 nm at R-2247.
